name: Pepper's Tuna Casserole
recipeIngredient: 6 1/2 oz Water-packed tuna; Salt to taste
1/2 cup Onion; diced Pepper to taste
2 cans Light cream of mushroom soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the egg noodles and drain.
2. Mix all ingredients in a baking dish, topping with cheese.
3. Bake at 350°F for about 45 minutes to 1 hour.
Nutrients per serving: Calories 72, fat 3g, cholesterol 5mg, carbohydrate 3g, sodium 146mg. Exchanges: Meat 1.
